summary: Runs the real extracted setup_pi_auth and the real outfitter dispatch in sh across three credential inputs exercising both skip paths (env-file API key, credential-dir auth.json) and the offer path (no credentials), asserting outfitter's output byte-equals pi's after the notice line — any outfitter-specific offer/skip divergence breaks the equality; only interactive I/O helpers are stubbed, identically for both runs.
